creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
This is still a problem in RELENG_8 as of Aug 28th.  The patch referenced in

<http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2010-August/058305.html>http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2010-August/058305.html 


fixes the issue for me
